reported_entities.name: Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF)
reported_entities.claim: Official website of the Cloud Native Computing Foundation, a Linux Foundation subsidiary founded in 2015 that hosts Kubernetes, Envoy, Prometheus, and other cloud native open source projects.
